label: Mazda MX-30 BEV

ecu.notes: ISO-15765-4 11-bit/500k confirmed by Car Scanner. Specific BMS DIDs not published.

notes: Forum reports: standard OBD-II returns very limited data; SOC missing from generic responses. No public decode table found that exposes BMS SOC/SOH/cell voltages on MX-30 at byte level.

unavailable_fields.all: Field not documented for this vendor in any open public source.
